sentences.arabic: رَأَى سَامِيٌّ ضَوْءًا فِي الْبَيْتِ الْقَدِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Sami je vidio svjetlo u staroj kući.
sentences.translationEn: Sami saw a light in the old house.
The house had been empty for years.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَ جَارَهُ: هَلْ رَأَيْتَ ضَوْءًا هُنَاكَ؟
sentences.translation: Pitao je susjeda: Jesi li vidio svjetlo tamo?
sentences.translationEn: He asked his neighbour: Did you see a light there?

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْجَارُ: نَعَمْ، رَأَيْتُهُ أَيْضًا الْبَارِحَةَ.
sentences.translation: Susjed je rekao: Da, vidio sam ga i sinoć.
sentences.translationEn: The neighbour said: Yes, I saw it yesterday too.

sentences.arabic: فِي الصَّبَاحِ عَرَفَا أَنَّ عَائِلَةً جَدِيدَةً انْتَقَلَتْ إِلَى الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Ujutro su saznali da se nova porodica uselila u kuću.
sentences.translationEn: In the morning they learned that a new family had moved into the house.
